metadata.description: Signals filtered by relative peer comparison thresholds: >5pp for deployment, >2pp for consideration

signals_deploy.description: Orange + Full Moon + Calm. +9.4pp vs peer colors (STRONGEST). Beats field by 2+ strokes 39% of rounds. Validated on 2025/2026.
Orange + New Moon + Calm. +5.9pp vs peer colors. Beats field by 2+ strokes 35.5% of rounds. Validated on 2025/2026.
Orange + New Moon (any condition). +5.9pp vs peer colors. Beats field by 2+ strokes 35.5% of rounds. Validated on 2025/2026.
Libra horoscope in MODERATE conditions (FADE). +8.7pp vs peer colors. Loses to field by 2+ strokes 34.5% of rounds. Avoid Libra in Moderate. Validated on 2025/2026.
Libra horoscope in TOUGH conditions (FADE). +37.6pp vs peer colors (EXTREME but tiny sample). Loses to field by 2+ strokes 50% of rounds. Avoid Libra in Tough. Validated on 2025/2026.

archived_signals.reason: Relative advantage < 5pp. At or below peer baseline. Not deployable as distinct signals.

list.reason: Below peer baseline (-0.1pp). No color-specific edge. Calm condition itself is favorable for all colors. Not distinct signal.
Marginal advantage (+0.4pp). Below 5pp threshold. Too weak for deployment.
Marginal advantage (+0.4pp). Libra fade effect disappears in Calm (too favorable for all). Only use in Moderate/Tough.

notes.sign_convention: vs_avg = score - course_avg. Negative = beats field (good). Positive = loses to field (bad).
notes.threshold_deployment: Relative advantage > 5pp (meaningfully better than peer colors)
notes.threshold_consideration: Relative advantage > 2pp (notably better, but not yet deployment-ready)
notes.key_insight: Only 5 signals pass 5pp threshold. 3 signals archived because they're at or below peer baseline. Relative peer comparison reveals which signals are truly distinct vs which are just riding the condition's inherent advantage.
notes.orange_calm_finding: NOT a color-specific signal. 29.4% is peer median (29.6%). All colors in Calm perform similarly. The Calm condition itself is the signal, not Orange.
notes.libra_finding: Condition-dependent FADE. Extreme effect in Tough (+37.6pp) but disappears in Calm (+0.4pp). Deploy in Moderate/Tough only.
